Product

Picao Caldense – Société des sauces is crafted in small artisanal batches to preserve authenticity, freshness, and depth of flavor. Rooted in traditional Colombian kitchens, each bottle carries a slow-built richness — bold seasoning, balanced heat, and a homemade character designed to elevate everyday meals into shared moments.

Signature Product

Picao Caldense – Signature Blend

Flavour Collection

  • Classic Piqué Salsa — Bright lime, fresh cilantro, and a tangy finish that lifts any dish.
  • Jalapeño Special — Crisp green jalapeño heat with a clean, vibrant intensity.
  • Spicy Thai Delight — A bold fusion inspired by global heat profiles with layered aromatic depth.

Available Quantities

  • 355 ml glass bottles — crafted for freshness and daily use
  • Half dozen (6 bottles) — ideal for sharing or stocking
  • Dozen (12 bottles) — for families, kitchens, and gatherings
  • Custom quantities available upon request

Flavor Profile

A balanced heat profile with savory depth, slow-building spice, and fresh herbal undertones — designed to complement rather than overpower.

How to Use

Perfect as a table sauce, marinade base, or finishing touch. From grilled meats to simple rice dishes, it transforms the ordinary into something memorable.

Storage

Refrigerate after opening. Shake well before serving to awaken the full flavor profile.

Order

To place an order or request custom quantities, use the Contact page chatbot.
